prompt:
Use case: historical-scene
Asset type: character-free 16:9 background plate for scene 1 of a layered paper-collage animation
Input images: Image 1 is the approved creek style sample; use only its paper fibers, mineral-pigment palette, restrained ink outlines, cut-paper edge language and dimensional paper shadows as the visual reference
Primary request: a modest generalized Tang-era mountain study room at late afternoon, seen wide from inside; low writing desk with blank paper, rolled blank book bundles, an open lattice window toward misty mountains, simple shelving and a doorway suggesting departure
Scene/backdrop: warm dim interior against cool celadon mountains outside; no people, no human silhouettes
Style/medium: premium handcrafted Chinese paper collage, hand-torn mulberry-paper edges, matte mineral pigments, subtle misregistration print texture, Song-album-page compositional calm
Composition/framing: wide 16:9, center and lower center kept readable for a seated character layer; clean subtitle-safe lower band; window at upper left, desk slightly right of center; clear depth planes without baked-in foreground branches
Lighting/mood: late-afternoon light fading, contemplative and slightly discouraged
Constraints: blank pages only; no written characters, captions, signs, watermark, logo, people, animals, modern items or frame border
Avoid: glossy 3D, plastic cartoon, photorealism, anime, crowded props, text-like marks
